title: ICU mobility review documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

medication.text: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.
medication.rationale: Supports multidisciplinary assessment and an entered rehabilitation plan for ICU mobility review; it does not generate a clinical decision.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.14 — stroke assessment and rehabilitation plan

medication.text: Supports documenting long-term-condition burden, day-to-day activity difficulty, support from multiple services, frailty or falls context, number of regular medicines, gait and self-reported health assessment when actually completed.
medication.rationale: Supports documented function, daily activities, falls and frailty context for ICU mobility review; it does not generate a clinical decision.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports documenting long-term-condition burden, day-to-day activity difficulty, support from multiple services, frailty or falls context, number of regular medicines, gait and self-reported health assessment when actually completed.

source.title: Multimorbidity: clinical assessment and management — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.4.4 — multimorbidity, daily activities, falls, medicines, and frailty context

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Baseline, current strength, consciousness, haemodynamic tolerance, devices, assistance, barriers and mobility session response are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, escalation or disposition is generated for ICU mobility review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
